summary: Verified all iteration-8 changes: (1) ConfirmDialog (integrated) replaces window.confirm for client/agency/shipment delete & shipment cancel, (2) detail pages ClientDetailPage & AgencyDetailPage with back-btn, (3) row click opens detail, no text edit/delete buttons in list rows, (4) edit/delete are icon-only with aria-label. 70/70 backend tests pass (66 existing + 4 new). All UI flows verified end-to-end via Playwright.

issues: Radix a11y warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on client-edit-dialog, agency-edit-dialog, confirm-dialog (and QR dialog). Non-blocking, carried over from prior iterations.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add DialogDescription to confirm-dialog / client-edit-dialog / agency-edit-dialog / QR dialog to silence Radix a11y warnings.

(Carried over) /api/auth/login still returns 500 instead of 401 when a staff-created client has no password_hash (no create_account). Existing test in test_agencies_and_edit.py accepts both statuses pending the fix.
critical_code_review_comments: ConfirmDialog properly closes via DialogContent's onOpenChange -> onCancel(); confirm-ok and confirm-cancel testids exposed; danger styling matches red brand. Used consistently in ClientDetailPage, AgencyDetailPage and ShipmentDetail.
GET /api/agencies/{id} is admin-only (require_admin) and returns serialize_user(a) + created_count. Verified: admin->200 with correct fields; agence->403; deleted agency->404.
ClientDetailPage and AgencyDetailPage correctly use back-btn (Link to list), navigate to list after delete, and reload data after edit.

ClientsList and AgenciesPage rows have cursor:pointer and contain NO inner buttons (verified via DOM inspection on agency row). Icon buttons live on detail pages only with aria-label Modifier / Supprimer (no visible text).

Shipment cancel button on /shipment/:id correctly opens confirm-dialog (NOT window.confirm), and confirm-ok calls PUT /api/shipments/{id}/cancel -> status 'annule'. Verified by inspecting GET /shipments/{id} response after click.
All tracking numbers correctly start with 'CL' (verified CL2263890841 in last cancel test).
Backend EDITABLE_STATUSES enforcement, role guards (require_staff for clients, require_admin for agencies), email duplication checks, and ObjectId handling all remain correct from iteration 7.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_detail_pages_and_delete.py (NEW - 4 tests for GET /agencies/{id}, GET /clients/{id}, full delete-then-404 flows, role guards)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (8/8 UI checks: agency row click + back-btn + icon edit + icon delete cancel + icon delete confirm + agence client delete via confirm-dialog + shipment cancel via confirm-dialog + nav-bo-agencies hidden for agence)

seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ prefixed agencies and clients during tests; all deleted by their own delete tests except 2 leftover TEST_ agencies from earlier iterations still listed in UI. Main agent may run cleanup if needed; no production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP fixes verified end-to-end. Selectors used: confirm-dialog, confirm-ok, confirm-cancel, client-row-<email>, agency-row-<email>, client-detail-page, agency-detail-page, back-btn, client-edit-btn, client-delete-btn, agency-edit-btn, agency-delete-btn, client-edit-dialog, agency-edit-dialog, edit-client-first-name/last-name/email/phone/address/save, edit-agency-name/email/phone/address/save, cancel-shipment-btn. The new agency-create form on /back-office/agencies uses inline fields agency-name/email/phone/address with a save button (we created agencies via API in the test to avoid flakiness, but the UI form is functional - see iteration 7). 70/70 pytest pass; pytest junit at /app/test_reports/pytest/iter8_full.xml.
rca of the issue: N/A - verification pass. All iteration-8 changes (ConfirmDialog replacing window.confirm, detail pages with back-btn, icon-only edit/delete actions, row-click navigation) behave exactly as specified in the PRD.
